message:
build(deps): switch all external path deps to git sources for portable builds

Replace local filesystem path dependencies (ftui, fastmcp-*, fastapi-*,
asupersync, rich_rust) with their GitHub git equivalents so the project
builds without requiring sibling repo checkouts at specific paths. This
enables CI, fresh clones, and remote compilation to work out of the box.

Add [patch] sections to resolve transitive path dependencies that
upstream repos reference as relative paths -- without these patches,
Cargo would fail to resolve the dependency graph when upstream Cargo.toml
files contain path = "../..." entries.

Update .gitignore to exclude .cargo/config.toml (used for local path
overrides during development; .cargo/config.toml.example serves as the
template). Regenerate Cargo.lock to reflect the new git-based sources.

Fixes #17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@ target-*/
 **/*.rs.bk
 Cargo.lock.bak
 
+# Local Cargo overrides (use .cargo/config.toml.example as template)
+.cargo/config.toml
+
 # IDE and editor files
 .idea/
 .vscode/

@@ -1591,7 +1591,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "crossterm 0.28.1",
  "parking_lot",
  "regex",
- "rich_rust 0.1.1 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
+ "rich_rust 0.1.1 (git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust?branch=master)",
  "unicode-width",
 ]
 
@@ -5161,8 +5161,7 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "rich_rust"
 version = "0.1.1"
-source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "8a7c2ecb6193f75fc8143648beb454f8b1d3a4fbd2fe13813a504760867d91b1"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust?branch=master#232a35595682328d0c5d110d64fc5e93771d431e"
 dependencies = [
  "bitflags 2.10.0",
  "crossterm 0.29.0",
@@ -5171,6 +5170,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "num-rational",
  "once_cell",
  "regex",
+ "smallvec",
  "time",
  "unicode-width",
 ]
@@ -7770,3 +7770,18 @@ checksum = "410e9ecef634c709e3831c2cfdb8d9c32164fae1c67496d5b68fff728eec37fe"
 dependencies = [
  "zune-core 0.5.1",
 ]
+
+[[patch.unused]]
+name = "asupersync"
+version = "0.1.1"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync#673cf66d7d316a53f3d7fb08a15999a97221c865"
+
+[[patch.unused]]
+name = "asupersync"
+version = "0.1.1"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync#673cf66d7d316a53f3d7fb08a15999a97221c865"
+
+[[patch.unused]]
+name = "asupersync"
+version = "0.1.1"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync#673cf66d7d316a53f3d7fb08a15999a97221c865"
